title: ComCare Interim Assistance
text:
ComCare Interim Assistance - SupportGoWhere
ComCare Interim Assistance
Share link
Provides immediate financial assistance for lower-income individuals or families who require urgent and temporary financial relief.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Receive cash assistance, supermarket vouchers, food rations
Apply at Social Service Offices, Community Centres or Family Service Centres
Collapse all sections
About this support

Cash assistance

Supermarket vouchers

Assistance provided will depend on the household situation

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident (at least one immediate family member in the same households must be a Singapore Citizen)

Monthly household income per capita of $800 and below

How to apply?

You may approach the following Community Partners:

Social Service Offices

Community Centre, Community Club, or Grassroots Leader

Family Service Centre (FSC) (for FSC clients)

Transitional Shelter (TS) (for TS clients)

Where can I find help?

ComCare Hotline: 1800 222 0000

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Ask_SSO@msf.gov.sg

Visit your nearest Social Service Office

Scheme last updated 29 Sep 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
